heading: Methods of implementation left to discretion of State
label: 21085 Methods of implementation left to discretion of State
text: The specific choices on the methods of complying with the requirements of this subchapter shall be left to the discretion of the State.
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title III of , , , which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of title III to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 107–252116 Stat. 1704Oct. 29, 2002
